title: PolishAndPlagiarismInput
description: Script input for Skill6 polish_and_plagiarism: Agent-polished Markdown plus audit metadata

formatted_draft.description: Skill5 output snapshot; required for diff checks when present

markdown.description: Pre-polish full paper Markdown from academic_formatting

markdown_path.description: Filesystem path to the formatted Markdown sidecar

issues.description: Issues recorded by Skill5; passed through for context only

polished_markdown.description: Agent-polished full paper Markdown; minimum ~3000 characters enforced by script

polish_constraints.description: Polish policy; defaults applied when omitted

tone.description: Target academic tone; aligns with writing_task.style_profile.tone

preserve_citations.description: When true, in-text [n] markers must match formatted_draft

preserve_headings.description: When true, heading lines must match formatted_draft

protected_claims.description: Factual claims that must remain verbatim substrings in polished_markdown

style.description: In-text citation marker style; numeric-bracket means [n]

forbidden_changes.description: Citation mutations that must not occur during polish

polish_log.description: Non-empty audit trail of substantive edits; required for polish_log_present

section.description: Section title or logical block where the edit occurred

before.description: Original phrase or sentence fragment (may be truncated)

after.description: Revised phrase or sentence fragment (may be truncated)

reason.description: Why the change was made, e.g. remove informal tone

plagiarism_optimization.description: Structured similarity-reduction suggestions; no external plagiarism API

location.description: Section or paragraph where similar phrasing was detected

accept_formatted_without_changes.description: Test/boundary flag: allow falling back to formatted_draft.markdown when polished_markdown is empty
